title: The Runebound Retrospective Supercut (4 hours of Runebound videos)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HBhaj0_Zm34

For those who want the complete Runebound education in one sitting, Daniel (@dungeondive) has compiled the entire retrospective series into a four-hour comprehensive supercut. From the foundational mechanics of second edition through all major and minor box expansions, character decks, variant rules, third edition, and a comparative analysis placing Runebound within the broader adventure gaming landscape—this is the definitive resource for understanding why Runebound remains such a beloved and hackable system.

Whether you're new to Runebound and want to understand the full scope of what's available, a collector planning your acquisitions, or simply someone who enjoys deep thematic dives into classic board game design, this supercut delivers everything needed to appreciate both the game's strengths and its place in gaming history. The compilation preserves all of Daniel's tangential asides, collector wisdom, and passionate arguments about why these simple systems continue to reward innovation and creative modification decades after their original release.

----

If you committed four hours to learning about a board game system, what would make that investment worthwhile to you?
